CODING.item: * SELECT * FROM cdhdr INTO TABLE it_cdhdr
DATA: lv_name TYPE thead-tdname, "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
lv_bedat TYPE ekko-bedat, "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
lv_cutoff TYPE d VALUE '20240812'. "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
lv_bedat = wa_hdr-bedat. "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T001W INTO WA_T001W
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005t INTO wa_plant
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_ADRC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdhdr INTO gv_revcnt
SELECT * FROM cdhdr INTO TABLE it_cdhdr
READ TABLE it_cdhdr INTO wa_cdhdr INDEX 1.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 2.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN cust WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN cust WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN cust1 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN cust1 WITH SPACE.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 2.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 3.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 4.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 5.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 6.
* CONCATENATE ship_to ls_lines-tdline INTO ship_to SEPARATED BY space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to1 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to1 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to2 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to2 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to3 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to3 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to4 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to4 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to5 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to5 WITH SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM mara INTO gv_mara
SELECT SINGLE * FROM EKET INTO WA_EKET
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
SELECT SINGLE * FROM MAKT INTO WA_MAKT
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN lines-tdline WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN lines-tdline WITH SPACE.
READ TABLE it_eine INTO wa_eine with key infnr = wa_ITEM-infnr.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE it_lines INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
select SINGLE * from eskl into wa_eskl where HPACKNO = wa_item-packno.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM esll INTO wa_esll WHERE PACKNO = wa_item-packno.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM esll INTO wa_serv WHERE PACKNO = wa_esll-SUB_PACKNO.
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY knumv = wa_hdr-knumv kposn = wa_item-ebelp
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY knumv = wa_hdr-knumv kposn = wa_item-ebelp
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY knumv = wa_hdr-knumv kposn = wa_item-ebelp
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'HB01' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'R000' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZEXP' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
READ TABLE xtkomv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZAFR' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
gv_total = gv_total + zch_amt + zch1_amt + GV_AFR + GV_ZEXP.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
replace all occurences of '<(>&<)>' in lines-tdline with '&'.
* replace all occurences of space in
* SELECT * FROM cdhdr INTO TABLE it_cdhdr
DATA: lv_name TYPE thead-tdname, "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
lv_bedat TYPE ekko-bedat, "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
lv_cutoff TYPE d VALUE '20240812'. "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
lv_bedat = wa_hdr-bedat. "ADDED BY SUPRIYA ON 13TH AUGUST 2024
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T001W INTO WA_T001W
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005t INTO wa_plant
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO WA_ADRC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdhdr INTO gv_revcnt
SELECT * FROM cdhdr INTO TABLE it_cdhdr
READ TABLE it_cdhdr INTO wa_cdhdr INDEX 1.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 2.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN cust WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN cust WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN cust1 WITH SPACE.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN cust1 WITH SPACE.
